title: koeleria gracilis var. britannica
intro: Koeleria gracilis var. britannica, also known as the small hair-grass or blue grass, is a perennial grass species native to the United Kingdom. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The medicinal properties of Koeleria gracilis var. britannica are believed to provide relief from various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, while its extracts have shown potential antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of Koeleria gracilis var. britannica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
